images.label: The Nile River turning red along an ancient Egyptian riverbank

images.alt: The Nile River turning red along an ancient Egyptian riverbank with reeds nearby

images.label: A staff transformed into a serpent on the floor before Pharaoh

images.alt: A staff transformed into a serpent on the floor before Pharaoh in an Egyptian court
